rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Vacating Notice Of Pendency Of Action [Lis Pendens] (Renewed)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 19, 2019, Line 10. DEFENDANTS ANNE KIHAGI, JULIA MWANGI, XELAN PROP 1, LLC, RENKA PROP, LLC, NOZARI 2, LLC, ZORIALL, LLC, CHRISTINE MWANGI'S Motion For Order Vacating Notice Of Pendency Of Action [Lis Pendens] (Renewed). Defendant's Motion for Order Vacating Notice of Pendency of Action is DENIED. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: RAUL VASQUEZ VS. NATIONAL DEFAULT SERVICING CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 19, 2019, Line 1. DEFENDANTS NATIONAL DEFAULT SERVICING CORPORATION, SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC., CITIGROUP MORTGAGE LOAN TRUST INC., U.S. BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Plaintiff's claims are barred by the statute of limitations and res judicata. Further, notwithstanding the label, Plaintiff's November 9, 2018 complaint is an Amended Complaint, not a supplemental complaint. All material facts giving rise to Defendant's claims occurred prior to January 21, 2017. The date when Plaintiff learned of those events is irrelevant for the analysis under C.C.P. 464. In fact, Plaintiff's discovery or pre-existing facts during the pendency of the complaint is exactly the type of event that triggers and provides basis for filing an amended complaint. The Court notes that Plaintiff violated CRC 8.1115. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JONATHAN B. NELSON VS. BRENDAN M MCGRATH ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 19, 2019, Line 4. CROSS DEFENDANT JONATHAN NELSON'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT. Continued to February 27, 2019 per stipulation and order. The Court notes that parties failed to provide a courtesy copy of their stipulation and a copy of the proposed order for execution.
